calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar

Hearing On Plaintiffs' Motion To A Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Judie Karen Edwards, Dale Edwards, Dave Edwards, Doug Edwards and Debra Alcorn, who were not present at today's hearing.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Judie Karen Edwards - Spouse, as Wrongful Death Heir - 90%
Dale Edwards - Son, as Wrongful Death Heir - 10%
Dave Edwards - Son, as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Doug Edwards - Son, as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Debra Alcorn - Daughter, as Wrongful Death Heir - 0%
Estate of Rex Edwards - 0%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds of $46,811.65, currently in Prayton Purcell LLP's possession, the sum of $1,039.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $45,772.65. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of Judie Karen Edwards shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
